title: Add notification priority levels (urgent, normal, low)
description: Users need a way to distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates. Currently all notifications appear with the same weight, causing important messages to be missed in the noise. Propose a three-tier priority system that visually differentiates urgency.

title: Notifications not delivered on Android 14 devices
description: Several users on Android 14 report that push notifications silently fail. Logcat shows the FCM token is refreshed but the delivery callback never fires. Affects approximately 8% of our Android user base. Workaround: users must manually re-enable notification permissions after OS update.

title: Implement ML-based notification batching
description: Instead of sending notifications individually, batch low-priority notifications into a digest delivered at optimal times based on user engagement patterns. The ML model should learn per-user preferences for delivery timing and grouping thresholds.

title: Add user preference page for notification categories
description: Users should be able to opt in/out of specific notification categories (marketing, product updates, social, transactional) from a settings page. This requires a new preferences API endpoint and a React settings component. Should respect existing global mute settings.

title: Reduce notification delivery latency from p95 340ms to under 200ms
description: Performance monitoring shows p95 notification delivery latency at 340ms, well above our 200ms SLO. Root cause appears to be synchronous database writes in the delivery pipeline. Proposed fix: move to async writes with a write-behind cache and switch to batch inserts for analytics events.
